parsed.production_notes: Characters are anthropomorphic fruits with uncanny, morphing human-like facial features. Lighting and textures exhibit typical AI inconsistencies, and lip-syncing is imprecise.

characters.appearance: Anthropomorphic pineapple girl. Human-like face, large brown eyes, freckles, green leafy crown. Expressive features ranging from sad to joyful.
characters.wardrobe: Orange t-shirt and blue denim overalls.

characters.appearance: Anthropomorphic pomegranate. Round red body, wrinkled human-like face, greyish top texture.
Anthropomorphic strawberry child. Small red body, big eyes, green leafy top.
Anthropomorphic lemon woman. Yellow skin, red lips.
Anthropomorphic avocado man. Green skin, large belly.

scenes.setting: Rustic kitchen, warm lighting, adobe walls, string lights.

panels.panel_visual_description: A rustic kitchen setting. An anthropomorphic pomegranate grandmother in a floral apron sits at a wooden table. Across from her is an anthropomorphic pineapple girl in denim overalls. A small strawberry child sits nearby. The table holds plates of tortillas and salsa. The background features adobe walls and string lights.

scenes.visual_description: The scene establishes a family dinner. The grandmother asks a question, confusing the pineapple girl. The camera cuts between the characters as they speak. Text overlays show the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: Maya, cuéntanos, ¿tienes novio? [Maya, tell us, do you have a boyfriend?]
Character A says: Novio? Um... no. No, no novio. [Boyfriend? Um... no. No, no boyfriend.]
Character C says: It means boyfriend. You don't know that word?

scenes.setting: Bathroom, beige tiles, white sink, mirror.

panels.panel_visual_description: A bathroom setting. An anthropomorphic pineapple girl stands in front of a mirror, crying with visible tears. Her reflection is shown in the mirror. A white sink with a silver faucet is in the foreground.

scenes.visual_description: The pineapple girl cries in front of a mirror, expressing frustration. The camera shoots over her shoulder to show her reflection. Text overlays display her dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Oh. My mom left everything so I could have a better life here. And I can't even talk to my own grandma.
scenes.on_screen_text:

panels.panel_visual_description: A sequence showing an anthropomorphic pineapple girl in different locations. She sits at a wooden desk looking at a smartphone. She rides a bus wearing headphones. She sits cross-legged on a bed in a white hoodie. Finally, she sits in a garden, looking at her phone with wide, surprised eyes.

scenes.visual_description: A fast-paced montage shows the pineapple girl studying on her phone in various settings, indicating dedication over time. The camera framing varies. No text overlays are present.

panels.panel_visual_description: An anthropomorphic pomegranate grandmother stands in a doorway with arms wide open. An anthropomorphic pineapple girl stands before her. They embrace tightly, both crying tears of joy. The grandmother's hands gently hold the pineapple girl's face.

scenes.visual_description: The grandmother welcomes the pineapple girl home. They share an emotional hug, crying tears of joy. The camera captures close-ups of their faces. Text overlays display their dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character B says: ¡Mi hija, llegaste! [My daughter, you're here!]
Character A says: Abuela, huele increíble. ¿Me enseñas? [Grandma, it smells amazing. Will you teach me?]
Character B says: Maya, ¿español? [Maya, Spanish?]
Character B says: Claro que sí, mi vida. Claro que sí. [Of course, my love. Of course.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Three anthropomorphic fruit characters stand in a doorway. A lemon woman in a pink blouse covers her mouth in surprise. An avocado man in a blue t-shirt smiles proudly with crossed arms. A small strawberry child in a green dress looks up with wide eyes. The view shifts to a close-up of the pomegranate grandmother, looking astonished with tears on her face.

scenes.visual_description: The extended family watches the reunion with surprise. The camera shows a wide shot of the family, then close-ups of the strawberry child and grandmother. Text overlays display the dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript:

panels.panel_visual_description: A close-up of an anthropomorphic pineapple girl in denim overalls. She smiles brightly, looking directly forward. The background is a softly blurred room with warm string lights.

scenes.visual_description: The pineapple girl breaks the fourth wall to deliver the product pitch directly to the viewer. The camera remains in a tight close-up. Text overlays display her dialogue.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: Honestly, I switched from Duolingo to Speak and learned by actually talking out loud.
